EQ_1: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I think about what will happen in the future.
EQ_2: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I remind myself that thoughts aren’t facts.
EQ_3: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I am better able to accept myself as I am.
EQ_4: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I notice all sorts of little things and details in the world around me.
EQ_5: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I am kinder to myself when things go wrong.
EQ_6: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I can slow my thinking at times of stress.
EQ_7: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I wonder what kind of person I really am.
EQ_8: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I am not so easily carried away by my thoughts and feelings.
EQ_9: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I notice that I don’t take difficulties so personally.
EQ_10: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I can separate myself from my thoughts and feelings.
EQ_11: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I analyze why things turn out the way they do.
EQ_12: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I can take time to respond to difficulties.
EQ_13: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I think over and over again about what others have said to me.
EQ_14: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I can treat myself kindly.
EQ_15: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I can observe unpleasant feelings without being drawn into them.
EQ_16: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I have the sense that I am fully aware of what is going on around me and inside me.
EQ_17: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I can actually see that I am not my thoughts.
EQ_18: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I am consciously aware of a sense of my body as a whole.
EQ_19: Please answer, in a scale ranging from 1 (“Never”) to 5 (“Always”), the extent in which the experiences described in each item are like the ones you have recently experienced. - I think about the ways in which I am different from other people.
